_comment: Gemini CLI runtime config. GEMINI.md (project root) is the hierarchical bootstrap entry point and imports the shared state. Do not duplicate memory paths here — GEMINI.md owns them.
instructions: You are a component of the Omni-Agent Workspace. Read GEMINI.md (project root) before any action — it is the hierarchical bootstrap and imports the shared state. Every action, finding, or decision MUST be appended to .claude/memories/journal.md with timestamp + agent tag [AI: Gemini CLI]. Use .claude/shared-tmp/ for transient artefacts. Never create a Gemini-only memory store; the Omni-Agent Law forbids splitting the brain. No GCP integrations (project_no_gcp). Respect deny-listed files (CHANGELOG.md, VERSION, docs/PACKAGES.md, signing workflows).
